Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Charlene Phyllis Rosack, Esq. for defendant only. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed by plaintiff, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
